---
title: "Page Not Found"
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .pipeline-stall-svg {
    display: block;
    max-width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    margin: 1.5rem auto 0.5rem auto;
  }
  .pipeline-stall-svg .packet { animation: pkt-flow 4.5s linear infinite; }
  .pipeline-stall-svg .packet-2 { animation-delay: 1.5s; }
  .pipeline-stall-svg .packet-3 { animation-delay: 3.0s; }
  @keyframes pkt-flow {
    0%   { transform: translate(40px, 0);  opacity: 1; }
    22%  { transform: translate(180px, 0); opacity: 1; }
    25%  { transform: translate(190px, 0); opacity: 1; }
    47%  { transform: translate(330px, 0); opacity: 1; }
    50%  { transform: translate(340px, 0); opacity: 1; }
    72%  { transform: translate(480px, 0); opacity: 1; }
    75%  { transform: translate(490px, 0); opacity: 1; }
    82%  { transform: translate(540px, 0); opacity: 0.4; }
    100% { transform: translate(540px, 0); opacity: 0; }
  }
  .pipeline-stall-svg .stall-stage { animation: stall-pulse 1.6s ease-in-out infinite; }
  @keyframes stall-pulse {
    0%, 100% { fill: #f9d6d5; }
    50%      { fill: #f0a8a5; }
  }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .pipeline-stall-svg .packet,
    .pipeline-stall-svg .stall-stage { animation: none; }
    .pipeline-stall-svg .packet { opacity: 0.35; }
  }

  .joke-card {
    background: #f7f7f7;
    border-left: 4px solid #a31f34;
    padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 4px;
    margin: 2rem 0;
  }
  .joke-card p {
    margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    font-style: italic;
    color: #333;
    line-height: 1.5;
    min-height: 3rem;
  }
  .joke-card button {
    background: #a31f34;
    color: #fff;
    border: none;
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    font-weight: 600;
  }
  .joke-card button:hover { background: #821827; }
</style>

<svg viewBox="0 0 680 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     font-family="Helvetica Neue, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif"
     class="pipeline-stall-svg" role="img"
     aria-label="An ML compute pipeline with four stages. Stages 1, 2, and 3 process data packets normally. Stage 4 has stalled and is displaying a 404 error.">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow404" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#555"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrow404-red" markerWidth="8" markerHeight="6" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#c44"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <text x="340" y="28" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#333">Pipeline stall: stage 4 returned 404</text>

  <!-- Stage 1: Fetch -->
  <rect x="40"  y="80" width="120" height="60" rx="4" fill="#cfe2f3" stroke="#4a90c4" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="100" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#333">Fetch</text>
  <text x="100" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">stage 1</text>

  <!-- Stage 2: Decode -->
  <rect x="190" y="80" width="120" height="60" rx="4" fill="#cfe2f3" stroke="#4a90c4" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="250" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#333">Decode</text>
  <text x="250" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">stage 2</text>

  <!-- Stage 3: Compute -->
  <rect x="340" y="80" width="120" height="60" rx="4" fill="#cfe2f3" stroke="#4a90c4" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="400" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#333">Compute</text>
  <text x="400" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" fill="#555">stage 3</text>

  <!-- Stage 4: STALL -->
  <rect x="490" y="80" width="120" height="60" rx="4" fill="#f9d6d5" stroke="#c44" stroke-width="1.5" class="stall-stage"/>
  <text x="550" y="104" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="#c44">⚠ STALL</text>
  <text x="550" y="128" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#a31f34">404</text>
  <text x="550" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8.5" font-weight="700" fill="#c44">stage 4 (missing)</text>

  <!-- Connectors -->
  <line x1="160" y1="110" x2="186" y2="110" stroke="#555" stroke-width="1.2" marker-end="url(#arrow404)"/>
  <line x1="310" y1="110" x2="336" y2="110" stroke="#555" stroke-width="1.2" marker-end="url(#arrow404)"/>
  <line x1="460" y1="110" x2="486" y2="110" stroke="#c44"  stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="4,2" marker-end="url(#arrow404-red)"/>

  <!-- Animated data packets flowing through stages 1, 2, 3 and dissolving at stage 4 -->
  <rect class="packet packet-1" y="100" width="20" height="20" rx="3" fill="#3d9e5a"/>
  <rect class="packet packet-2" y="100" width="20" height="20" rx="3" fill="#3d9e5a"/>
  <rect class="packet packet-3" y="100" width="20" height="20" rx="3" fill="#3d9e5a"/>

  <text x="340" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#999" font-style="italic">The page you requested never made it to writeback.</text>
</svg>
```

You've landed on a corner of `mlsysbook.ai` that doesn't exist — an old link, a typo, or a subsite that hasn't shipped yet. While you're here, have a joke on the house.

```{=html}
<div class="joke-card" role="region" aria-label="Random ML systems joke">
  <p id="joke-text">Loading joke…</p>
  <button id="joke-btn" type="button">🔁 Tell me another</button>
</div>
<script>
(function(){
  const jokes = [
    "Why did the GPU break up with the CPU? It needed more bandwidth in the relationship.",
    "I asked my model how it felt about the test set. It had no opinion — it had never seen one.",
    "There are two hard problems in ML systems: cache invalidation, off-by-one batch sizes, and naming things.",
    "Why did the transformer cross the road? Self-attention.",
    "Memory-bound, compute-bound, ego-bound — only one of these is fixable with more FLOPs.",
    "My batch size is 1. My patience is 0. My gradients are NaN.",
    "Distributed systems: where two GPUs agree on the time, but not on the gradient.",
    "I don't always do inference — but when I do, I prefer it batched.",
    "My model is 99% accurate. My users are 100% unhappy. The 1% was load-bearing.",
    "Knock knock. — Who's there? — … — … — (timeout after 30s)",
    "Roofline says we're memory-bound. The CFO says we're budget-bound.",
    "ML in three steps: collect data, train a model, blame the data.",
    "Why don't optimizers trust stairs? Too many local minima.",
    "My model runs in fp16 and fp32. It's wrong in both, just at different speeds.",
    "What do you call a neural network with no training data? A confidently incorrect oracle.",
    "Pipeline parallelism: where every stage is waiting for someone else to finish.",
    "I added more layers. The loss went down. I have no idea why. Ship it.",
    "Why did the data loader file a complaint? It said the GPU kept it waiting and never apologized.",
    "Reproducibility checklist: same seed ✓ same code ✓ same data ✓ different answer."
  ];
  const $text = document.getElementById('joke-text');
  const $btn  = document.getElementById('joke-btn');
  let last = -1;
  function pick() {
    let i;
    do { i = Math.floor(Math.random() * jokes.length); }
    while (i === last && jokes.length > 1);
    last = i;
    $text.textContent = jokes[i];
  }
  $btn.addEventListener('click', pick);
  pick();
})();
</script>
```

## 🧭 Start here

- [🏠 mlsysbook.ai](/) — the unified landing page
- [📖 Volume I: Foundations](/vol1/)
- [📖 Volume II: At Scale](/vol2/)
- [🔥 TinyTorch](/tinytorch/) · [🔮 Labs](/labs/) · [📦 Hardware Kits](/kits/) · [🧮 MLSys·im](/mlsysim/)
- [🎞️ Slides](/slides/) · [🎓 Instructor Hub](/instructors/) · [🎯 StaffML](/staffml/)

## 🐛 Still lost?

- [📝 Report a broken link](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/issues/new)
- [💬 Ask the community](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions)

---

*"Every system has a 404 page. Welcome to ours." 🪐*
